definition: Business viability independent of founder involvement; testable by founder exit from operations.
rationale: Load-bearing concept with clear mechanism: founder dependency masks supply constraints and prevents scaling.

splits.definition: Most businesses hire without structured training; actual training cadence near zero despite role complexity.

definition: Revenue-share and commission models enable businesses with zero capital by aligning operator earnings with profit.
rationale: Original cluster merges compensation structure (load-bearing) with cultural failure (training absence); these are orthogonal.

definition: Build team, produce massive volume, measure winners, double down; competitive edge via execution speed and data.
rationale: Exemplary framework with quantified examples (450/week, 1.44M record), mechanism (volume→selection), and time-anchor (4-year foundation).

definition: Separate inbound (reliable, lower per-deal) and outbound (high-variance high-reward) paths; align compensation to net profit.
rationale: Named conditions (inbound vs. outbound), mechanisms (alignment prevents gaming), and specific numbers ($42k base, 10% assignment, 25% revenue share).

definition: How long you maintain intended behavior before disruption from hardship; improvable via practice and biology (sleep, food).
rationale: Self-identifies as mental-toughness component; mechanism explicit (hardship reduces tolerance via biology); measurable via behavior persistence.

definition: Gap between sales promises and fulfillment capability drives cancellations and churn; key constraint on sales growth.
rationale: Original name vague; 'misalignment' passive. Renamed to 'Promise-Delivery Gap' for action and clarity.

splits.definition: Create mid-tier by removing high-value features (e.g., guarantees) from premium; downgrade creates re-upsell path.

definition: Combine and reduce features to single core value stack; overwhelm reduction (Planet Fitness model: 10-15% of competitor features, lower price).
rationale: Original cluster merges two frameworks: bundling (simplify by combining) vs. tiering (differentiate by removing). Split for clarity.

definition: Build audience on content naturally leading to offer; wrong audience on large platform worse than right audience on small.
rationale: Original 'Bait-and-Switch Prevention' is symptom; root is content-offer congruence. Renamed for mechanism clarity.

definition: Hiring talent is a ladder; each level (SDR→manager→VP) unlocks discontinuous capability jumps and shifts what's possible.
rationale: Load-bearing; operationalizes 'levels' with discontinuous jumps; aligns with 'Who Game' framework; scaling constraint (scaled $6M to $100M).

definition: Education has zero post-learning value; one-time sale model caps retention at ~zero and revenue at $1-3M ceiling.
rationale: Hard constraint with identified ceiling; falsifiable via revenue and retention metrics; retention zero by design, not failure.

Speculative future claim lacks mechanism, source anchor, and falsifiability. Time-bound assertion (12-24 months, voice/text agents replacing UI) is unfalsifiable without evidence. Fails NODE-QUALITY-RUBRIC B6 (source-grounded); fails C5 (falsifiable). Remove.

definition: Permanent behavior shift from aversive stimulus; direction (positive/negative) determined by adaptation; differs from resilience (recovery speed).
rationale: Mechanism explicit; operationalizes 'permanent' with behavior trajectory shift; includes adaptation factor and comparison to resilience.

definition: Every choice eliminates its alternative; regrets are psychological weight of paths not taken; unavoidable, so choose which ones to accept.
rationale: Self-identifies framework; mechanism (imagined upsides without costs breed regret); source-grounded (Hitchens/Murray quoted exchange).

splits.definition: Exits, revenue, companies, headcount are table-stakes for B2B trust; mention once, understood; static proof.

definition: Two proof types: past accomplishment (static, hard to fake) and real-time demonstration (dynamic, harder to fake); stakes determine proof priority.
rationale: Original cluster merges proof types (achievement vs. effort/real-time) with table-stakes accomplishments. Split into frameworks and component traits.

Feature-list claim (NODE-QUALITY-RUBRIC A2). 'Install Claude Code with VSCode and API keys' is implementation detail, not claim. No mechanism, no conditionals, no behavior-change implication. Demote to practice/implementation_details, not claim. Fails C1–C5 scoring matrix.
